file(GLOB NET_SRCS "src/*.cpp")

# Cross-straddle REQUIRES come from staging/components/<repo>/spangap_requires.cmake,
# auto-generated by spangap-inside from this straddle's requires:/optional_requires:
# intersected with the staged set. The on-device Settings panes (Net → Wifi and
# Net → mDNS) live in esp-idf/conditional/spangap-lcd/, compiled only when the lcd
# straddle is staged, and register via the when:-gated netLcdRegister /
# mdnsLcdRegister init hooks — no #if anywhere.
include(${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/spangap_requires.cmake)
idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${NET_SRCS}
        ${SPANGAP_CONDITIONAL_SRCS}
    INCLUDE_DIRS "include" ${SPANGAP_CONDITIONAL_INCLUDE_DIRS}
    REQUIRES
        ${SPANGAP_REQUIRES}
        esp_event
        esp_wifi
        esp_netif
        nvs_flash
        lwip
        mbedtls
        esp_http_client
        espressif__mdns
        esp_timer
        json
)
